assumptions: No prior SingleStore account configuration or successful use exists.
The developer has the browser and command-line tools listed by the selected path.

developer_goal: A Helios Free Shared Edition workspace executes a SQL query in the hosted Cloud Portal SQL Editor.

first_success.outcome: A Helios Free Shared Edition workspace executes a SQL query in the hosted Cloud Portal SQL Editor.
first_success.observable_signal: The SQL Editor displays a successful result set for the submitted query.

route_selection.surface: Helios Free Shared Edition + Cloud Portal SQL Editor
route_selection.rule: Prefer the official hosted quickstart and cURL when documented; stop at the first observable successful happy-path result.
route_selection.selected: Helios Free Shared Edition + Cloud Portal SQL Editor

candidates.name: Helios Free Shared Edition + Cloud Portal SQL Editor
candidates.reason: It is the specified official path to the first-success boundary.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to SingleStore Helios Cloud Portal.
Create a Free Shared Edition workspace and wait until it is available.
required_path.observable_result: The workspace reports an active state.

required_path.action: Open the workspace SQL Editor and run the getting-started query.
Inspect the result grid in Cloud Portal.
required_path.observable_result: A successful query result is visible.

prerequisites.description: A Free Shared Edition workspace created in Cloud Portal.

external_gates.description: The workspace must finish platform-managed provisioning before SQL Editor access.
Free Shared Edition availability can depend on current account and region options.

platform_outcomes.description: A Helios Free Shared Edition workspace executes a SQL query in the hosted Cloud Portal SQL Editor.

excluded.reason: This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.
This occurs after the selected first-success boundary.

sources.title: Run a query in the Cloud Portal SQL Editor
evidence_supported: A Helios Free Shared Edition workspace executes a SQL query in the hosted Cloud Portal SQL Editor.
The SQL Editor displays a successful result set for the submitted query.

uncertainties.question: Does fresh-account UI wording differ from the documented Run a query in the Cloud Portal SQL Editor path?
uncertainties.impact: A human should judge minor navigation differences without moving the first-success boundary.
